title: March
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|March}} '''March''' is the third month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. 26''' – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Recon Missions]]'' in 2015. ==Events concerning [[Wookieepedia]]== *'''Mar 4''' – Wookieepedia is founded in 2005. *'''Mar 21''' – Wookieepedia as [[Forum:Senate Hall|Senate Hall]] in 2006. ==Other ''[[Star Wars]]'' events== *'''Mar 5''' – [[John Williams]] begins conducting and recording the ''[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Star Wars]]'' [[musical score]] in 1977. *'''Mar 5''' – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] begins in 1979. *'''Mar 10''' – [[Harrison Ford]] and [[Peter Mayhew]] are filmed confronting the [[XJ9-CS14|probe droid]] for ''The Empire Strikes Back''. *'''Mar 9''' – The [[Wookieepedia#Great LucasCruft Purge|Great LucasCruft Purge]] begins on [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia|Wikipedia]] in 2005. *'''Mar 16''' – [[John Williams]] concludes conducting and recording of the ''Star Wars'' [[musical score]] in 1977. *'''Mar 22''' – Shooting begins for ''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' in 1976. *'''Mar 26''' – While filming ''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'', the first winter rainstorm in 50 years occurred in Tunisia in 1976.
